title: Scavenges
summary: When not running and hiding, you sift the ruins of civilization for useful remnants to ensure your survival.
tiers: Tier 3: Taking Advantage or Incredible Health
Tier 6: Artifact Scavenger or Reactive Field
Tier 3: Harder Light or Sculpt Light
gm_intrusions: A hard light object disappears early. A hard light object cannot affect a certain creature or color.
text: When not running and hiding, you sift the ruins of civilization for useful remnants to ensure your survival. SCULPTS HARD LIGHT You create physical objects out of hard light that you can use for offense and defense.
details: When not running and hiding, you sift the ruins of civilization for useful remnants to ensure your survival.
You create physical objects out of hard light that you can use for offense and defense.
